  <what_happened>Read</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-26T06:19:13.556Z</occurred_at>

  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"g:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\GameState\\\\WantedPosterState.ts\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"g:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\GameState\\\\WantedPosterState.ts\",\"content\":\"import { log, Node, Vec3, warn } from \\\"cc\\\";\\nimport { BaseState, eventManager, stateManager } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/Managers\\\";\\nimport GameView from \\\"../GameView\\\";\\nimport Game_Define from \\\"../Game_Define\\\";\\nimport protocol from \\\"@igs-arcade-division-rd2/uk_815_pirates_queen_9999_proto/ar2pq9Proto.js\\\";\\nimport { WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT } from \\\"../WantedPoster/WantedPosterManager\\\";\\nimport { MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT } from \\\"../MultBase/MultiplierBaseManager\\\";\\nimport { Define } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/utilis\\\";\\n\\nexport class WantedPosterState extends BaseState\\n{\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n\\n    constructor( gameView: GameView )\\n    {\\n        super();\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n    }\\n\\n    public async OnEnter()\\n    {\\n\\n        log( \\\"OnEnter State : WANTED_POSTER\\\" );\\n        const plateInfo = this.m_gameView.SpinAck.RoundQueue[ this.m_gameView.CurRoundIndex ]\\n            .PlateQueue[ this.m_gameView.CurPlateIndex ];\\n\\n        const awardDataVec = plateInfo.AwardDataVec ?? [];\\n        const bountyDataVec = plateInfo.BountyDataVec ?? [];\\n\\n        // BC-3：找出被消除的符號中，有哪些命中懸賞令的 BaseSymbol\\n        const triggeredBounties = this.FindTriggeredBounties( awardDataVec, bountyDataVec );\\n\\n        if ( triggeredBounties.length === 0 )\\n        {\\n\\n            stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.MATCHING_PATCH_UP );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 以 BaseSymbol 分組，同組合併成一隻 spine（連乘）\\n        const basePlateIndexes = plateInfo.BasePlateIndex ?? [];\\n        const groups = this.GroupBountiesByBaseSymbol( triggeredBounties );\\n\\n        // 新流程③：symbol/wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 步驟①完成，本狀態只播懸賞令 spine 演出；\\n        // 多個不同 BaseSymbol 群組改為「並行」一起演出（不再逐組序列）。\\n        await Promise.all( groups.map( group => this.PlayBountyGroupPerform(\\n            group, awardDataVec, plateInfo.PlateSymbol, basePlateIndexes\\n        ) ) );\\n\\n        stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.MATCHING_PATCH_UP );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess() { }\\n\\n    public OnLeave() { }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 對「一組同 BaseSymbol 的懸賞」執行 ①Mark → ②Symbol_In → ③(Mark_Active ∥ Symbol_Active) → ④底板SET\\n     *\\n     * 透過 WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT 與常駐 WantedPosterManager 溝通；\\n     * 場上 Wanted Spine 由 EffectPlate.SpawnAndPlayWantedSymbolIn / PlayWantedSymbolActiveAndRecycle 直接呼叫\\n     *\\n     * 合併語意：同組所有 bounty 共用同一 BaseSymbol（前提②）與同一組位置\\n     * （同 BaseSymbol → awardDataVec 對應唯一一筆 award），故 spawn 只跑一次。\\n     *\\n     * BC-4：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有常駐 item 同時播 Mark → Mark_Active，最後各自 active=false（Manager.OnEvent 內處理）\\n     * BC-6：階段 ③ Mark_Active 與 Symbol_Active 同 Promise.all 起播\\n     * BC-7：場上 spine 顯示組內 Multiple 連乘（純表演）\\n     * 新流程③：symbol/wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 步驟①完成，本方法不再消除，只播 spine 演出。\\n     * EH-1：找不到對應 item 由 Manager 內部 warn + 立刻 resolve，不阻斷流程\\n     */\\n    private async PlayBountyGroupPerform(\\n        group: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[],\\n        awardDataVec: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IAwardData[],\\n        curPlateSymbol: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IColumn[],\\n        basePlateIndexes: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IIntAry[]\\n    ): Promise<void>\\n    {\\n        if ( group.length === 0 ) return;\\n\\n        // 組內共同 BaseSymbol（前提②：同 BaseSymbol 的 BountySymbol 一定相同）\\n        const baseSymbol = group[ 0 ].BaseSymbol;\\n        if ( baseSymbol === null || baseSymbol === undefined )\\n        {\\n            warn( '[WantedPosterState] PlayBountyGroupPerform: BaseSymbol 為空，跳過' );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 位置由組內共同 BaseSymbol 單次取得（與組內筆數無關）\\n        const matchedAward = awardDataVec.find(\\n            award => award.Symbol === baseSymbol\\n                && award.EliminatePos\\n                && award.EliminatePos.length > 0\\n        );\\n        if ( !matchedAward ) return;\\n\\n        // 過濾掉 Wild 位置（spine 與 ④底板只跑非 wild；wild 的消除/底板已在 ExplodeState 處理）\\n        const filteredPositions = this.FilterNonWildPositions(\\n            matchedAward.EliminatePos!, curPlateSymbol\\n        );\\n        // 無非 wild 位置 → 無 spine 可演（wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 完成）\\n        if ( filteredPositions.length === 0 ) return;\\n\\n        // 場上 spine 顯示倍率 = 組內 Multiple 連乘（純表演）\\n        const multiplier = this.ComputeGroupMultiplier( group );\\n\\n        // 把 positions(一維索引) 轉為世界座標（事件 payload 用世界座標，避免在 manager 跨越 SlotReels 依賴）\\n        const worldPositions = filteredPositions.map( pos => {\\n            const col = Math.floor( pos / Game_Define.ROW );\\n            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n            return this.m_gameView.SlotReels.GetSymbolInitWorldPositionFromColRow( col, row );\\n        } );\\n\\n        // ① Mark — 事件 + Promise wrapper（同 EffectPlate 對 MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER 的風格）\\n        await new Promise<void>( resolve => {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK,\\n                baseSymbol,\\n                resolve\\n            );\\n        } );\\n\\n        // ② 懸賞令 spine 進場（Symbol_In）。symbol/wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 步驟①完成，此處不再消除\\n        const spawnedNodes: Node[] = await this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.SpawnAndPlayWantedSymbolIn(\\n            worldPositions, baseSymbol, multiplier\\n        );\\n\\n        // ③ Mark_Active ∥ Symbol_Active 同時起播\\n        await Promise.all( [\\n            new Promise<void>( resolve => {\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                    WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE,\\n                    baseSymbol,\\n                    resolve\\n                );\\n            } ),\\n            this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.PlayWantedSymbolActiveAndRecycle( spawnedNodes ),\\n        ] );\\n\\n        // ④ 場上 Wanted 表演完成後，更新懸賞令位置的乘倍底板（帶 Spine 動畫）\\n        // 移到組末才升底板，避免被階段②/③的 Spine 動畫分散視覺焦點\\n        await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, 0.5 );\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_SHOW, -1, true );\\n        const upgradePromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for ( const pos of filteredPositions )\\n        {\\n            const col = Math.floor( pos / Game_Define.ROW );\\n            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n            upgradePromises.push( new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n            {\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                    MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_MULTIPLIER_WITH_ANIM,\\n                    pos,\\n                    basePlateIndexes[ col ].Data[ row ],\\n                    resolve\\n                );\\n            } ) );\\n        }\\n        await Promise.all( upgradePromises );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-1：將已觸發的 bounty 以 BaseSymbol 分組\\n     * 同 BaseSymbol 歸同組；組順序依各 BaseSymbol 首次出現順序，組內保留原順序。\\n     * 輸入契約：吃 FindTriggeredBounties 的輸出（已觸發子集），非原始 bountyDataVec。\\n     */\\n    private GroupBountiesByBaseSymbol(\\n        bounties: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    ): protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[][]\\n    {\\n        const groups: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[][] = [];\\n        const groupIndexByBaseSymbol = new Map<number, number>();\\n        for ( const bounty of bounties )\\n        {\\n            const key = bounty.BaseSymbol;\\n            if ( key === null || key === undefined ) continue;\\n            const existing = groupIndexByBaseSymbol.get( key );\\n            if ( existing !== undefined )\\n            {\\n                groups[ existing ].push( bounty );\\n            }\\n            else\\n            {\\n                groupIndexByBaseSymbol.set( key, groups.length );\\n                groups.push( [ bounty ] );\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return groups;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-2：組內 Multiple 連乘（純函式）\\n     * DR-9：Multiple 為 null/undefined/非有限數 → 視為中性值 1（跳過不計），避免連乘塌成 0。\\n     * 空組回 1。\\n     */\\n    private ComputeGroupMultiplier(\\n        group: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    ): number\\n    {\\n        let product = 1;\\n        for ( const bounty of group )\\n        {\\n            const m = bounty.Multiple;\\n            if ( m !== null && m !== undefined && Number.isFinite( m ) )\\n            {\\n                product *= m;\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return product;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 找出被消除的符號中命中懸賞令的資料\\n     * BC-3：EliminatePos.length > 0 代表該符號有被消除；\\n     *       若其 Symbol 值等於某懸賞令的 [];\\n        const bountyDataVec = plateInfo.BountyDataVec ?? [];\\n\\n        // BC-3：找出被消除的符號中，有哪些命中懸賞令的 BaseSymbol\\n        const triggeredBounties = this.FindTriggeredBounties( awardDataVec, bountyDataVec );\\n\\n        if ( triggeredBounties.length === 0 )\\n        {\\n\\n            stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.MATCHING_PATCH_UP );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 以 BaseSymbol 分組，同組合併成一隻 spine（連乘）\\n        const basePlateIndexes = plateInfo.BasePlateIndex ?? [];\\n        const groups = this.GroupBountiesByBaseSymbol( triggeredBounties );\\n\\n        // 新流程③：symbol/wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 步驟①完成，本狀態只播懸賞令 spine 演出；\\n        // 多個不同 BaseSymbol 群組改為「並行」一起演出（不再逐組序列）。\\n        await Promise.all( groups.map( group => this.PlayBountyGroupPerform(\\n            group, awardDataVec, plateInfo.PlateSymbol, basePlateIndexes\\n        ) ) );\\n\\n        stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.MATCHING_PATCH_UP );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess() { }\\n\\n    public OnLeave() { }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 對「一組同 BaseSymbol 的懸賞」執行 ①Mark → ②Symbol_In → ③(Mark_Active ∥ Symbol_Active) → ④底板SET\\n     *\\n     * 透過 WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT 與常駐 WantedPosterManager 溝通；\\n     * 場上 Wanted Spine 由 EffectPlate.SpawnAndPlayWantedSymbolIn / BaseSymbol 的所有常駐 item 同時播 Mark → Mark_Active，最後各自 active=false（Manager.OnEvent 內處理）\\n     * BC-6：階段 ③ Mark_Active 與 Symbol_Active 同 Promise.all 起播\\n     * BC-7：場上 spine 顯示組內 Multiple 連乘（純表演）\\n     * 新流程③：symbol/wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 步驟①完成，本方法不再消除，只播 spine 演出。\\n     * EH-1：找不到對應 item 由 Manager 內部 warn + 立刻 resolve，不阻斷流程\\n     */\\n    private async PlayBountyGroupPerform(\\n        group: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[],\\n        awardDataVec: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IAwardData[],\\n        curPlateSymbol: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IColumn[],\\n        basePlateIndexes: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IIntAry[]\\n    ): Promise<void>\\n    {\\n        if ( group.length === 0 ) return;\\n\\n        // 組內共同 BaseSymbol（前提②：同 BaseSymbol 的 BountySymbol 一定相同）\\n        const baseSymbol = group[ 0 ].BaseSymbol;\\n        if ( baseSymbol === null || baseSymbol === undefined )\\n        {\\n            warn( '[WantedPosterState] PlayBountyGroupPerform: BaseSymbol 為空，跳過' );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 位置由組內共同 BaseSymbol 單次取得（與組內筆數無關）\\n        const matchedAward = awardDataVec.find(\\n            award => award.Symbol === baseSymbol\\n                && award.EliminatePos\\n                && award.EliminatePos.length > 0\\n        );\\n        if ( !matchedAward ) return;\\n\\n        // 過濾掉 Wild 位置（spine 與 ④底板只跑非 wild；wild 的消除/底板已在 ExplodeState 處理）\\n        const filteredPositions = this.FilterNonWildPositions(\\n            matchedAward.EliminatePos!, curPlateSymbol\\n        );\\n        // 無非 wild 位置 → 無 spine 可演（wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 完成）\\n        if ( filteredPositions.length === 0 ) return;\\n\\n        // 場上 spine 顯示倍率 = 組內 Multiple 連乘（純表演）\\n        const multiplier = this.ComputeGroupMultiplier( group );\\n\\n        // 把 positions(一維索引) 轉為世界座標（事件 payload 用世界座標，避免在 manager 跨越 SlotReels 依賴）\\n        const worldPositions = filteredPositions.map( pos => {\\n            const col = Math.floor( pos / Game_Define.ROW );\\n            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n            return this.m_gameView.SlotReels.GetSymbolInitWorldPositionFromColRow( col, row );\\n        } );\\n\\n        // ① Mark — 事件 + Promise wrapper（同 EffectPlate 對 MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER 的風格）\\n        await new Promise<void>( resolve => {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK,\\n                baseSymbol,\\n                resolve\\n            );\\n        } );\\n\\n        // ② 懸賞令 spine 進場（Symbol_In）。symbol/wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 步驟①完成，此處不再消除\\n        const spawnedNodes: Node[] = await this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.SpawnAndPlayWantedSymbolIn(\\n            worldPositions, baseSymbol, multiplier\\n        );\\n\\n        // ③ Mark_Active ∥ Symbol_Active 同時起播\\n        await Promise.all( [\\n            new Promise<void>( resolve => {\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                    WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE,\\n                    baseSymbol,\\n                    resolve\\n                );\\n            } ),\\n            this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.PlayWantedSymbolActiveAndRecycle( spawnedNodes ),\\n        ] );\\n\\n        // ④ 場上 Wanted 表演完成後，更新懸賞令位置的乘倍底板（帶 Spine 動畫）\\n        // 移到組末才升底板，避免被階段②/③的 Spine 動畫分散視覺焦點\\n        await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, 0.5 );\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_SHOW, -1, true );\\n        const upgradePromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for ( const pos of filteredPositions )\\n        {\\n            const col = Math.floor( pos / Game_Define.ROW );\\n            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n            upgradePromises.push( new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n            {\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                    MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_MULTIPLIER_WITH_ANIM,\\n                    pos,\\n                    basePlateIndexes[ col ].Data[ row ],\\n                    resolve\\n                );\\n            } ) );\\n        }\\n        await Promise.all( upgradePromises );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-1：將已觸發的 bounty 以 BaseSymbol 分組\\n     * 同 BaseSymbol 歸同組；組順序依各 BaseSymbol 首次出現順序，組內保留原順序。\\n     * 輸入契約：吃 FindTriggeredBounties 的輸出（已觸發子集），非原始 bountyDataVec。\\n     */\\n    private GroupBountiesByBaseSymbol(\\n        bounties: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    ): protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[][]\\n    {\\n        const groups: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[][] = [];\\n        const groupIndexByBaseSymbol = new Map<number, number>();\\n        for ( const bounty of bounties )\\n        {\\n            const key = bounty.BaseSymbol;\\n            if ( key === null || key === undefined ) continue;\\n            const existing = groupIndexByBaseSymbol.get( key );\\n            if ( existing !== undefined )\\n            {\\n                groups[ existing ].push( bounty );\\n            }\\n            else\\n            {\\n                groupIndexByBaseSymbol.set( key, groups.length );\\n                groups.push( [ bounty ] );\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return groups;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-2：組內 Multiple 連乘（純函式）\\n     * DR-9：Multiple 為 null/undefined/非有限數 → 視為中性值 1（跳過不計），避免連乘塌成 0。\\n     * 空組回 1。\\n     */\\n    private ComputeGroupMultiplier(\\n        group: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    ): number\\n    {\\n        let product = 1;\\n        for ( const bounty of group )\\n        {\\n            const m = bounty.Multiple;\\n            if ( m !== null && m !== undefined && Number.isFinite( m ) )\\n            {\\n                product *= m;\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return product;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 找出被消除的符號中命中懸賞令的資料\\n     * BC-3：EliminatePos.length > 0 代表該符號有被消除；\\n     *       若其 Symbol 值等於某懸賞令的 bountyDataVec.length === 0 )\\n        {\\n            return [];\\n        }\\n\\n        // 收集本次被消除的符號 ID\\n        const eliminatedSymbols = new Set<number>();\\n        for ( const award of awardDataVec )\\n        {\\n            if ( award.EliminatePos && award.EliminatePos.length > 0\\n                && award.Symbol !== null && award.Symbol !== undefined )\\n            {\\n                eliminatedSymbols.add( award.Symbol );\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 比對懸賞令的 BaseSymbol\\n        return bountyDataVec.filter( bounty =>\\n            bounty.BaseSymbol !== null && bounty.BaseSymbol !== undefined\\n            && eliminatedSymbols.has( bounty.BaseSymbol )\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 過濾掉 Wild 位置，只保留實際為 BaseSymbol 的位置\\n     */\\n    private Looking at the code, I can see:

- The comment at line ~139-140 mentions: "④ 場上 Wanted 表演完成後，更新懸賞令位置的乘倍底板（帶 Spine 動畫）" (After Wanted performance completes, update multiplier bases at wanted poster positions with Spine animation)

This is just discovery phase - no changes made yet. I should record this as a discovery observation.

aiTitle: Register Wanted_MultiAdd sound effect in AudioManager

content.thinking:
Great! The first part of the task is complete - registering the Wanted_MultiAdd audio effect in AudioManager. The edit shows:

1. Added `Wanted_MultiAdd: { FileName: "Wanted_MultiAdd", Clip: null },` to the AudioClips object in AudioManager.ts
2. It was inserted right after Wanted_burn, following the same pattern as other Wanted audio effects
3. This registration will allow GameView to auto-load the audio file from Sound/Wanted_MultiAdd.mp3

Now they need to:
1. Import AudioManager into WantedPosterState.ts
2. Add the Play call in the multiplier refresh section

This is a significant milestone - the audio is now registered in the system.

this.LoadDemoDataSync(CHEAT_KEY.FREE_GAME);\\n            RecoverSpinAck.getInstance().ConvertDemoAck(freeGameData, targetBet);\\n            this.m_realFeatureSpinAck.push(freeGameData);\\n        } catch (loadError) {\\n            error(\\\"載入測試資料檔案失敗:\\\", loadError);\\n            // 即使載入失敗，也確保陣列已初始化\\n            this.m_realFeatureSpinAck = [];\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch this.m_realFeatureSpinAck.length;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 載入測試資料（同步版本）\\n     * @param fileName 檔案名稱（不含副檔名）\\n     * @returns BufferAsset 資料\\n     */\\n    private LoadBinaryFile(fileName: string): BufferAsset\\n    {\\n        return this.m_BinaryFileForDemo.find(file => file.name === fileName);\\n    }\\n\\n    CheckBigAwardHint( roundInfo: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IRoundInfo )\\n    {\\n        // 只有一般模式（BetType=0, SpinType=0）才觸發大獎預報\\n        if ( this.SpinAck.BetType !== 0 || this.SpinAck.SpinType !== 0 )\\n        {\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n\\n        let win = roundInfo.RoundWin ? roundInfo.RoundWin : 0;\\n        let bet = newBottombarManager.GetNowBetValue();\\n        let odds = tools.divide( win, bet ); // 贏分倍率\\n        let rand = Define.HAS_REPLAY ? 0 : Math.random(); // 機率條件(重播固定機率)\\n        \\n        if ( !this.m_isFreeGame )\\n        {\\n            // MG\\n            if ( roundInfo.RoundWin / bet >= 10 && odds >= 20 && rand < 0.2 )\\n roundInfo );\\n        if ( show )\\n        {\\n            await this.m_effectPlate.PlayBigAwardEffect();\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 載入測試資料（同步版本）\\n     * @param fileName            }\\n        } catch (parseError) {\\n            error(`解析測試檔案 ${fileName} 失敗:`, parseError);\\n            throw parseError;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    // 震動：上下左右震，大瞄準\\n    BigHintShake( shakeTime: number, distance: number = Game_Define.BIG_SHAKE_DISTANCE )\\n    {\\n        let dt = distance;\\n        let time = Game_Define.BIG_SHAKE_FREQUENCY;\\n        // 重複次數\\n        let repeatTimes = shakeTime / ( time * 5 ) - 1;\\n\\n        // 連續呼叫：先停舊的歸位，保留第一次的原點\\n        if ( this.m_bigHintShake )\\n        {\\n            this.m_bigHintShake.stop();\\n            this.m_bigHintShake = null;\\n            this.node.setPosition( this.m_shakeOriginX, this.m_shakeOriginY );\\n        }\\n        else\\n        {\\n            // 只有第一次才記錄原點\\n   <outcome>"{\"filePath\":\"g:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\GameState\\\\WantedPosterState.ts\",\"oldString\":\"import { MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT } from \\\"../MultBase/MultiplierBaseManager\\\";\\nimport { Define } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/utilis\\\";\",\"newString\":\"import { MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT } from \\\"../MultBase/MultiplierBaseManager\\\";\\nimport { Define } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/utilis\\\";\\nimport { AudioManager } from \\\"../Audio/AudioManager\\\";\",\"originalFile\":\"import { log, Node, Vec3, warn } from \\\"cc\\\";\\nimport { BaseState, eventManager, stateManager } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/Managers\\\";\\nimport GameView from \\\"../GameView\\\";\\nimport Game_Define from \\\"../Game_Define\\\";\\nimport protocol from \\\"@igs-arcade-division-rd2/uk_815_pirates_queen_9999_proto/ar2pq9Proto.js\\\";\\nimport { WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT } from \\\"../WantedPoster/WantedPosterManager\\\";\\nimport { MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT } from \\\"../MultBase/MultiplierBaseManager\\\";\\nimport { Define } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/utilis\\\";\\n\\nexport class WantedPosterState extends BaseState\\n{\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n\\n    constructor( gameView: GameView )\\n    {\\n        super();\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n    }\\n\\n    public async OnEnter()\\n    {\\n\\n        log( \\\"OnEnter State : WANTED_POSTER\\\" );\\n        const plateInfo = this.m_gameView.SpinAck.RoundQueue[ this.m_gameView.CurRoundIndex ]\\n            .PlateQueue[ this.m_gameView.CurPlateIndex ];\\n\\n        const awardDataVec = plateInfo.AwardDataVec ?? [];\\n        const bountyDataVec = plateInfo.BountyDataVec ?? [];\\n\\n        // BC-3：找出被消除的符號中，有哪些命中懸賞令的 BaseSymbol\\n        const triggeredBounties = this.FindTriggeredBounties( awardDataVec, bountyDataVec );\\n\\n        if ( triggeredBounties.length === 0 )\\n        {\\n\\n            stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.MATCHING_PATCH_UP );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 以 BaseSymbol 分組，同組合併成一隻 spine（連乘）\\n        const basePlateIndexes = plateInfo.BasePlateIndex ?? [];\\n        const groups = this.GroupBountiesByBaseSymbol( triggeredBounties );\\n\\n        // 新流程③：symbol/wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 步驟①完成，本狀態只播懸賞令 spine 演出；\\n        // 多個不同 BaseSymbol 群組改為「並行」一起演出（不再逐組序列）。\\n        await Promise.all( groups.map( group => this.PlayBountyGroupPerform(\\n            group, awardDataVec, plateInfo.PlateSymbol, basePlateIndexes\\n        ) ) );\\n\\n        stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.MATCHING_PATCH_UP );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess() { }\\n\\n    public OnLeave() { }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 對「一組同 BaseSymbol 的懸賞」執行 ①Mark → ②Symbol_In → ③(Mark_Active ∥ Symbol_Active) → ④底板SET\\n     *\\n     * 透過 WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT 與常駐 WantedPosterManager 溝通；\\n     * 場上 Wanted Spine 由 EffectPlate.SpawnAndPlayWantedSymbolIn / PlayWantedSymbolActiveAndRecycle 直接呼叫\\n     *\\n     * 合併語意：同組所有 bounty 共用同一 BaseSymbol（前提②）與同一組位置\\n     * （同 BaseSymbol → awardDataVec 對應唯一一筆 award），故 spawn 只跑一次。\\n     *\\n     * BC-4：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有常駐 item 同時播 Mark → Mark_Active，最後各自 active=false（Manager.OnEvent 內處理）\\n     * BC-6：階段 ③ Mark_Active 與 Symbol_Active 同 Promise.all 起播\\n     * BC-7：場上 spine 顯示組內 Multiple 連乘（純表演）\\n     * 新流程③：symbol/wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 步驟①完成，本方法不再消除，只播 spine 演出。\\n     * EH-1：找不到對應 item 由 Manager 內部 warn + 立刻 resolve，不阻斷流程\\n     */\\n    private async PlayBountyGroupPerform(\\n        group: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[],\\n        awardDataVec: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IAwardData[],\\n        curPlateSymbol: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IColumn[],\\n        basePlateIndexes: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IIntAry[]\\n    ): Promise<void>\\n    {\\n        if ( group.length === 0 ) return;\\n\\n        // 組內共同 BaseSymbol（前提②：同 BaseSymbol 的 BountySymbol 一定相同）\\n        const baseSymbol = group[ 0 ].BaseSymbol;\\n        if ( baseSymbol === null || baseSymbol === undefined )\\n        {\\n            warn( '[WantedPosterState] PlayBountyGroupPerform: BaseSymbol 為空，跳過' );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 位置由組內共同 BaseSymbol 單次取得（與組內筆數無關）\\n        const matchedAward = awardDataVec.find(\\n            award => award.Symbol === baseSymbol\\n                && award.EliminatePos\\n                && award.EliminatePos.length > 0\\n        );\\n        if ( !matchedAward ) return;\\n\\n        // 過濾掉 Wild 位置（spine 與 ④底板只跑非 wild；wild 的消除/底板已在 ExplodeState 處理）\\n        const filteredPositions = this.FilterNonWildPositions(\\n            matchedAward.EliminatePos!, curPlateSymbol\\n        );\\n        // 無非 wild 位置 → 無 spine 可演（wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 完成）\\n        if ( filteredPositions.length === 0 ) return;\\n\\n        // 場上 spine 顯示倍率 = 組內 Multiple 連乘（純表演）\\n        const multiplier = this.ComputeGroupMultiplier( group );\\n\\n        // 把 positions(一維索引) 轉為世界座標（事件 payload 用世界座標，避免在 manager 跨越 SlotReels 依賴）\\n        const worldPositions = filteredPositions.map( pos => {\\n            const col = Math.floor( pos / Game_Define.ROW );\\n            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n            return this.m_gameView.SlotReels.GetSymbolInitWorldPositionFromColRow( col, row );\\n        } );\\n\\n        // ① Mark — 事件 + Promise wrapper（同 EffectPlate 對 MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER 的風格）\\n        await new Promise<void>( resolve => {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK,\\n                baseSymbol,\\n                resolve\\n            );\\n        } );\\n\\n        // ② 懸賞令 spine 進場（Symbol_In）。symbol/wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 步驟①完成，此處不再消除\\n        const spawnedNodes: Node[] = await this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.SpawnAndPlayWantedSymbolIn(\\n            worldPositions, baseSymbol, multiplier\\n        );\\n\\n        // ③ Mark_Active ∥ Symbol_Active 同時起播\\n        await Promise.all( [\\n            new Promise<void>( resolve => {\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                    WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE,\\n                    baseSymbol,\\n                    resolve\\n                );\\n            } ),\\n            this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.PlayWantedSymbolActiveAndRecycle( spawnedNodes ),\\n        ] );\\n\\n        // ④ 場上 Wanted 表演完成後，更新懸賞令位置的乘倍底板（帶 Spine 動畫）\\n        // 移到組末才升底板，避免被階段②/③的 Spine 動畫分散視覺焦點\\n        await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, 0.5 );\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_SHOW, -1, true );\\n        const upgradePromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for ( const pos of filteredPositions )\\n        {\\n            const col = Math.floor( pos / Game_Define.ROW );\\n            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n            upgradePromises.push( new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n            {\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                    MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_MULTIPLIER_WITH_ANIM,\\n                    pos,\\n                    basePlateIndexes[ col ].Data[ row ],\\n                    resolve\\n                );\\n            } ) );\\n        }\\n        await Promise.all( upgradePromises );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-1：將已觸發的 bounty 以 BaseSymbol 分組\\n     * 同 BaseSymbol 歸同組；組順序依各 BaseSymbol 首次出現順序，組內保留原順序。\\n     * 輸入契約：吃 FindTriggeredBounties 的輸出（已觸發子集），非原始 bountyDataVec。\\n     */\\n    private GroupBountiesByBaseSymbol(\\n        bounties: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    ): protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[][]\\n    {\\n        const groups: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[][] = [];\\n        const groupIndexByBaseSymbol = new Map<number, number>();\\n        for ( const bounty of bounties )\\n        {\\n            const key = bounty.BaseSymbol;\\n            if ( key === null || key === undefined ) continue;\\n            const existing = groupIndexByBaseSymbol.get( key );\\n            if ( existing !== undefined )\\n            {\\n                groups[ existing ].push( bounty );\\n            }\\n            else\\n            {\\n                groupIndexByBaseSymbol.set( key, groups.length );\\n                groups.push( [ bounty ] );\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return groups;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-2：組內 Multiple 連乘（純函式）\\n     * DR-9：Multiple 為 null/undefined/非有限數 → 視為中性值 1（跳過不計），避免連乘塌成 0。\\n     * 空組回 1。\\n     */\\n    private ComputeGroupMultiplier(\\n        group: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    ): number\\n    {\\n        let product = 1;\\n        for ( const bounty of group )\\n        {\\n            const m = bounty.Multiple;\\n            if ( m !== null && m !== undefined && Number.isFinite( m ) )\\n            {\\n                product *= m;\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return product;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 找出被消除的符號中命中懸賞令的資料\\n     * BC-3：EliminatePos.length > 0 代表該符號有被消除；\\n     *       若其 Symbol 值等於某懸賞令的 BaseSymbol，則該懸賞令被觸發。\\n     * R-4：award.Symbol / bounty.BaseSymbol 在 proto 是 number|null，過濾掉 null/undefined 避免污染 Set\\n     */\\n    private FindTriggeredBounties(\\n        awardDataVec: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IAwardData[],\\n        bountyDataVec: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    ): protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    {\\n        if ( awardDataVec.length === 0 || bountyDataVec.length === 0 )\\n        {\\n            return [];\\n        }\\n\\n        // 收集本次被消除的符號 ID\\n        const eliminatedSymbols = new Set<number>();\\n        for ( const award of awardDataVec )\\n        {\\n            if ( award.EliminatePos && award.EliminatePos.length > 0\\n                && award.Symbol !== null && award.Symbol !== undefined )\\n            {\\n                eliminatedSymbols.add( award.Symbol );\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 比對懸賞令的 BaseSymbol\\n        return bountyDataVec.filter( bounty =>\\n            bounty.BaseSymbol !== null && bounty.BaseSymbol !== undefined\\n            && eliminatedSymbols.has( bounty.BaseSymbol )\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 過濾掉 Wild 位置，只保留實際為 BaseSymbol 的位置\\n     */\\n    private FilterNonWildPositions(\\n        positions: number[],\\n        curPlateSymbol: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IColumn[]\\n    ): number[]\\n    {\\n        return positions.filter( pos =>\\n        {\\n            const col = Math.floor( pos / Game_Define.ROW );\\n            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n            const sym = curPlateSymbol?.[ col ]?.Col?.[ row ] ?? -1;\\n            return sym !== Game_Define.Symbol.Wild;\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":6,\"oldLines\":6,\"newStart\":6,\"newLines\":7,\"lines\":[\" import { WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT } The comment was updated to reflect that all three Wanted audio effects now have the same concurrent limit to handle parallel group execution scenarios introduced by the bounty system refactor.
